SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing

Class AbstractBackwardSlicer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractSlicer
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractBackwardSlicer
Direct Known Subclasses:
ThinBackwardSlicer
public abstract class AbstractBackwardSlicer extends AbstractSlicer
Provides a basic implementation of backward slicing algorithms.

  • Method Details

    • doSlicing

      public ImmutableArray<Node> doSlicing(Node seedNode, Location seedLocation, ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> sec) throws ProofInputException
      Performs the slicing.
      Specified by:
      doSlicing in class AbstractSlicer
      Parameters:
      seedNode - The seed Node to start slicing at.
      seedLocation - The seed Location.
      sec - The optional ISymbolicEquivalenceClasses to consider.
      Returns:
      The computed slice.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • accept

      protected abstract boolean accept(Node node, Node previousChild, Services services, Set<Location> relevantLocations, AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info, SourceElement activeStatement) throws ProofInputException
      Decides if the given Node is part of the slice or not.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node to check.
      previousChild - The previously visited child Node or null the first time.
      services - The Services to use.
      relevantLocations - The relevant locations.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      activeStatement - The currently active statement.
      Returns:
      true Node should be part of slice, false Node should not be part of slice.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • updateRelevantLocations

      protected void updateRelevantLocations(ProgramElement read, Set<Location> relevantLocations, AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo info, Services services)
      Updates the relevant locations.
      Parameters:
      read - The Expression which provides new relevant locations.
      relevantLocations - The relevant locations to update.
      info - The AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo with the aliases and so on.
      services - The Services to use.

    • updateOutdatedLocations

      protected Set<Location> updateOutdatedLocations(Services services, Set<Location> oldLocationsToUpdate, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> newAliases, Map<Location,SortedSet<Location>> oldAliases, Location outdatedPrefix, ReferencePrefix thisReference)
      Updates the outdated locations. This means that locations with the given prefix are replaced with another previously (old) available alternative.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      oldLocationsToUpdate - The locations to update.
      newAliases - The new aliases.
      oldAliases - The old aliases.
      outdatedPrefix - The prefix of outdated locations.
      thisReference - The ReferencePrefix which is represented by this (ThisReference).
      Returns:
      The updated locations.
